mapper.select: SELECT id, record_id, content, created_at, updated_at, version, is_deleted AS deleted FROM data_annotation WHERE record_id = #{recordId,jdbcType=OTHER} AND (#{includeDeleted} = true OR is_deleted = false) ORDER BY created_at

SELECT id, record_id, content, created_at, updated_at, version, is_deleted AS deleted FROM data_annotation WHERE id = #{annotationId,jdbcType=OTHER} AND (#{includeDeleted} = true OR is_deleted = false)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO data_annotation (id, record_id, content, created_by) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{recordId,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{content}, #{createdBy,jdbcType=OTHER} )
mapper.update: UPDATE data_annotation SET is_deleted = true, deleted_at = now(), deleted_by = #{deletedBy,jdbcType=OTHER}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{annotationId,jdbcType=OTHER} AND is_deleted = false AND version = #{expectedVersion}
